headline: Cencora CFO Retirement Puts Capital Allocation And Growth Plans In Focus
summary: Cencora (NYSE:COR) announced the planned retirement of Chief Financial Officer and Executive Vice President James F. Cleary. The company has begun a leadership transition process and initiated an executive search to identify his successor. Cleary’s retirement marks the end of a long tenure in the CFO role and a significant change in Cencora’s senior leadership team. Cencora, a major player in pharmaceutical distribution and related services, sits at the center of global drug supply chains,...
